summary: I can’t reliably produce a truthful "today / last 24h" market scan from the web with the information provided because I don’t have live browsing access in this chat. The search snippets you supplied only expose a few relevant updates, so I’m returning a conservative, source-grounded snapshot rather than inventing current analyst calls.
